ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "matchup" TEXT /* Matchup information (e.g., team names) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number worn by the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach leading the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the team plays home games */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Coach's social media handle */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player */,
  "fg3m" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* Three-point field goal attempts */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "min_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_bio" (
  "bio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biography */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the biography belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school the player attended */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_roster" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the roster belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Contract status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the player is on the roster */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's salary for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the schedule belongs to */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the game is played */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the game */,
  "tv_channel" TEXT /* TV channel broadcasting the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_arena FOREIGN KEY ("arena") REFERENCES arenas ("arena_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the arena (e.g., city, state) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  "capacity_seating" INTEGER /* Seating capacity */,
  "capacity_standing" INTEGER /* Standing capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "estimated_return_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of return from injury */,
  "rehab_program" TEXT /* Description of the rehabilitation program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the suspension belongs to */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension started */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Number of games the player is suspended for */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_star_games" (
  "all_star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each All-Star game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the All-Star game belongs to */,
  "all_star_date" TEXT /* Date of the All-Star game */,
  "all_star_team" TEXT /* Team the player played for in the All-Star game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the All-Star game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("all_star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_star_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the playoff belongs to */,
  "playoff_date" TEXT /* Date of the playoff */,
  "playoff_round" TEXT /* Round of the playoff (e.g., first round, conference finals) */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the championship belongs to */,
  "championship_date" TEXT /* Date of the championship */,
  "championship_year" INTEGER /* Year the championship was won */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
